market_positions.model_note: Entry was justified by suppressed first-half shooting, low break-even at +113, and expected catch-up script, but fourth-quarter shot quality and 3P failure prevented closeout.

game_flow_phases.read: Detroit established the defensive pressure profile immediately. Cleveland had five turnovers and shot 36.8% from the field with only one made three. Detroit converted early pressure into transition and spacing rhythm.
Detroit extended the lead to 54-43 at halftime. Cleveland remained within striking range because of free throws and Allen interior scoring, but Harden and the perimeter group were still inefficient.

This was the live strike window. Cleveland cleaned up turnovers to zero for the quarter, shot 55% from the field and 57.1% from three, cutting the game to 79-75. The CLE TT over 99.5 entry became live with a plausible path.

The ticket failed in the closing segment. Cleveland shot 8-for-23 and 0-for-11 from three in the fourth. Detroit stabilized behind Cunningham shot-making and late free throws. Cleveland finished three points short of the 100-point threshold.

pivotal_moments.moment: Detroit forced three Cleveland turnovers inside the first three minutes and jumped to a 12-5 lead.
pivotal_moments.model_relevance: Confirms Detroit pressure can suppress Cleveland early possession quality and create negative first-half team-total drift.

pivotal_moments.moment: Cleveland made its comeback push behind Mitchell threes, Allen paint touches and Strus perimeter support, narrowing the gap to one.
pivotal_moments.model_relevance: Validated the LiveFlow strike logic but only for short-window scoring bursts, not full-game closeout reliability.

pivotal_moments.moment: Cleveland briefly took the lead 81-79, but Detroit immediately answered with Harris and Robinson scoring.
pivotal_moments.model_relevance: Cleveland comeback scripts remain fragile when Detroit can re-open spacing through Cunningham/Robinson actions.

pivotal_moments.moment: Detroit closed the game from 98-91 to 107-97 while Cleveland missed several perimeter attempts.
pivotal_moments.model_relevance: Late-game Cavs overs require a better shot-quality/three-point stabilizer before firing.

what_model_got_right: Cleveland had a real live recovery window in the third quarter.
The +113 price was a favorable market entry relative to break-even probability.
Detroit's pressure profile was correctly identified as the main threat to Cleveland scoring rhythm.
what_model_missed: Cleveland's fourth-quarter three-point failure was not penalized enough.
Harden's low-efficiency usage dragged the offense more than expected.
Detroit's late-game response after Cleveland took the lead was stronger than projected.

rolling_window_notes_for_game3: Detroit pressure is now a two-game stable feature, not a one-game anomaly.
Cleveland team total overs need stricter late-game shot-quality confirmation, especially when Harden is inefficient and Strus is cold.
Mitchell can carry scoring bursts, but one-player surge scripts are fragile against Detroit's depth and spacing counters.
Jarrett Allen interior scoring was efficient and should be treated as a Cleveland stabilizer, but not enough alone for team-total overs without perimeter conversion.
Cade Cunningham closeout profile should receive a 4Q stability boost in live spread and Pistons team total modeling.

recommended_patches.trigger: Cleveland live team total over requires at least neutral 3P form or a clear foul-extension path after 3Q.
recommended_patches.action: Downgrade CLE TT overs by 4-7 percentage points when 4Q reliance shifts to Mitchell/Harden perimeter creation without Strus support.

recommended_patches.trigger: Detroit leading or tied in final six minutes with Cunningham plus Robinson/Harris spacing active.
recommended_patches.action: Boost Detroit late-game scoring floor and reduce opposing comeback/cover probability.

recommended_patches.trigger: Harden below 40% FG with multiple turnovers entering second half.
recommended_patches.action: Reduce Cleveland team total mean by 2.5 to 4.0 unless assist creation or free-throw rate offsets.

final_grade.model_confidence_adjustment: Downgrade future CLE live TT overs unless late-game shot profile confirms.
final_grade.rolling_window_weight: High for Detroit defensive pressure and Cleveland late-game shot-quality risk; medium for total projections because Cleveland nearly reached threshold despite poor 3P shooting.
